The Official Pledge Badge · Mauritius 2025

The Reality

Every Accident Is A Family
That Will Never Be The Same.

Mauritius loses around 150 lives on its roads every year. These are not strangers. They are parents, children, friends — people who left home and never came back.

~150
Road fatalities per year on average
#1
Speeding, drunk driving & distracted driving — leading causes
Rs 100M+
Economic cost of road accidents annually
Most
Vulnerable: motorcyclists, pedestrians & young drivers

"We spend our lives planning for the future — but a single distracted second can erase it. The sticker doesn't stop the accident. The driver does."

Simple. Structured. Scalable.

How It Works

Five steps to become part of Mauritius's growing road safety movement.

1
Sign the Pledge
Fill in the registration form below. Individuals, motorcyclists, permit holders & companies all welcome.
2
Pay the Participation Fee
Rs 100 per vehicle/year. Fleets at Rs 200 per vehicle/year. This funds the entire national program.
3
Receive Your Badge
A physical waterproof vinyl sticker for your windshield & a digital badge + certificate via email.
4
Wear It With Pride
Every badge on the road is a message to other drivers: responsible driving is normal here.
5
Renew Each Year
New badge design every year. New pledge number. New commitment. The movement keeps growing.
Your Visible Commitment

The Badge Changes Minds Before You Say A Word.

When you display your badge, you push the message to every driver behind you. You are not just pledging — you are influencing.

Physical waterproof vinyl sticker · New design each year

🛡️
Physical Windshield Sticker
Waterproof vinyl badge shipped to you. Visible to every driver around you — turning your car into a message.
📜
Digital Certificate & Pledge Number
A personalised certificate with your unique pledge number. Shareable on social media.
🏆
Status & Community
Join a growing movement. Companies get their logo on the Supporters Wall and a certified ESG Impact Report.
SAFE DRIVER
Individual · Rs 100/yr
For private car owners, motorcyclists & permit holders
SAFE FLEET PARTNER
Corporate · Rs 200/vehicle/yr
For companies, rentals, logistics & transport operators
ROAD SAFETY CHAMPION
Program Sponsor · Custom
Full co-branding, national recognition & school programs
📦

Your badge will be delivered physically. Every participant receives a waterproof vinyl windshield sticker by post or collection point. Corporate fleet packages include bulk delivery.

Participation Tiers

Whether You Have One Car Or A Hundred —
There Is A Place For You.

🚗
Individual Driver
Rs 100 /vehicle/year
Participation fee includes:
  • Physical waterproof vinyl badge
  • Digital pledge certificate
  • Unique pledge number
  • Annual new badge design
  • Part of a national movement
🏍️
Motorcyclist
Rs 100 /year
Participation fee includes:
  • Physical badge for your bike
  • Digital pledge certificate
  • Unique pledge number
  • Annual new badge design
  • Part of a national movement
📄
No Vehicle / Permit Holder
Rs 100 /year
Participation fee includes:
  • Digital badge & certificate
  • Unique pledge number
  • Carry the commitment as a pedestrian or future driver
  • Share on social media
Most Impactful
🏢
Fleet / Corporate
Rs 200 /vehicle/year
Participation fee includes:
  • Badges for all fleet vehicles
  • Company logo on Supporters Wall
  • Certified ESG Impact Report
  • Safe Fleet Partner certificate
  • Staff road safety workshop (with Police Road Safety Unit)
  • CSR-reportable initiative
Join The Movement

Sign The Pledge Today.

One signature. One sticker. One less reason for a family to grieve. Drive like your family is in the other car.

What your participation fee covers: Running and growing the national awareness campaign · Educational content and road safety outreach · Community road safety initiatives selected by ADPS · Physical badge production & delivery · Digital certificate and pledge platform · ADPS may also, at its discretion, provide support to families or individuals affected by road accidents — this is not guaranteed and does not constitute insurance or a legal commitment.

This is a voluntary initiative by Africa Development Program Services (ADPS). Participation does not modify legal liability, constitute insurance, or guarantee any safety outcome. ADPS may, at its discretion, support families affected by road accidents — this is a community commitment, not a contractual obligation.

Transparency

Where Every Rupee Goes

A live impact tracker on pledge.adps.mu shows every rupee collected and every initiative funded. Transparency is the foundation of trust.

40%
School Safety Workshops
On-site road safety education for students and young drivers, delivered in partnership with the Police Road Safety Unit.
30%
National Awareness Campaigns
Social media, radio, billboards and community events reaching all corners of Mauritius.
20%
Platform & Badge Production
Maintaining the pledge platform, printing waterproof badges and delivering them island-wide.
10%
Operations & Administration
ADPS program management, partner coordination and annual impact reporting for corporate participants.

⚠️ Important Notice: ADPS may, at its discretion, offer support to families or individuals affected by road accidents as part of our community commitment. This is not guaranteed, does not constitute insurance, and creates no legal or financial obligation on ADPS. Participation in the program does not entitle participants to any form of compensation or benefit.

Africa Development Program Services (ADPS)
